Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and features in the game.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Updates dynamic strings with timestamps for real-time data display.
Changed_Other.purpose: Keeps players informed with up-to-date information in the game.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores the Git hash as a fast string for quick access.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by speeding up the retrieval of version information.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance, leading to faster game loading and smoother experiences.

Added_Other.name: FFlagFoundationPopoverNegateAlignOffsetOnFlip_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts alignment offsets for popovers when they are flipped.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures popovers display correctly and consistently in the user interface.

Added_Other.name: FFlagFoundationPopoverOverflow_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the layout of popover menus to prevent overflow issues.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that popover menus display correctly without cutting off content.
